Based on technical analysis, there are patterns indicating that SOL might reach the upper Bollinger Band at around $96 in the coming weeks.

data.title: Dogecoin Ditching The Shiba Inu For A 'Tasteful' Corporate Identity? You Might Want To Check Your Calendar
data.description: Dogecoin attempted an April Fools' Day prank on social media, issuing a fake "restructuring" announcement. The official Dogecoin account humorously proposed changes like replacing the iconic Shiba Inu logo with a navy blue emblem and banning meme language. The post mentioned a 67-page whitepaper and stakeholder rebranding. However, it's clear this satirical move won't be happening for the popular cryptocurrency. The announcement aimed to amuse followers, preempting any potential confusion on April 1st. The news spread quickly but was soon revealed as a prank by Dogecoin. The community can rest assured that the beloved Shiba Inu mascot remains a central part of the Dogecoin identity, with no plans for drastic changes.

data.title: Crypto Fear & Greed Index shows ‘extreme fear,’ but Bitcoin staying strong above $60k hinting positivity.
data.description: The current Crypto Fear and Greed Index continues to show extreme fear among investors. Despite this, Bitcoin is showing resilience by maintaining its position above the $60,000 support level. This could indicate a potential positive trend for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Texas's 2nd top official urges research on crypto and prediction markets amidst concerns over rising gambling activity.
data.description: The second-ranking official in Texas has urged lawmakers to investigate the rapid rise of prediction market gambling. This comes as numerous jurisdictions are initiating legal actions against these platforms.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Conagra Expectations Ahead Of Q3 Earnings
data.description: Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE: CAG) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings before the market opens on Wednesday, April 1. Analysts are predicting that the Chicago-based company will report earnings of 40 cents per share for the quarter, a decrease from the 51 cents per share reported in the same period last year. The consensus among analysts is that Conagra's quarterly revenue will be around $2.76 billion, down from the previous year's $2.84 billion. Conagra declared a quarterly dividend of 35 cents per share on March 31. The company's stock closed at $15.72 on Tuesday, experiencing a slight 0.1% decrease. For further details on analyst ratings and insights, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga. Discover the latest ratings from the most accurate analysts and their perspectives on the company's performance. Access the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric Acquires Irish Elevator Company Infinity Lifts
data.description: In Tokyo, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation (TOKYO: 6503) revealed plans for a full acquisition of Infinity Lifts Limited, an elevator firm in Ennis, Ireland. The takeover, set to occur on March 18, is projected to finalize by the first half of 2026 pending regulatory clearance and meeting standard closing requirements. Mitsubishi Electric, alongside its Tokyo subsidiary Mitsubishi Electric Building So, is at the forefront of this strategic move.
